text.text:
*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1J|MIT-MAP-1J: Pagination offset overflow crashing /brands>*
15 events · Recurring · 8 users affected
→ Linear: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-863/fix-pagination-offset-overflow-crashing-brands-listing-page|DEV-863>
_Action: Add server-side bounds check before passing offset to PostgREST; redirect to last valid page when offset ≥ row count._

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1B|MIT-MAP-1B: Missing brand_slug_redirects table on brand detail pages>*
12 events · Recurring · 2 users affected
→ Linear: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-864/resolve-missing-brand-slug-redirects-table-breaking-brand-detail-pages|DEV-864>
_Action: Apply the missing DB migration and reload the PostgREST schema cache (`NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema'`)._

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1C|MIT-MAP-1C: Truncated PostgREST error on brand detail page>*
5 events · Recurring · 1 user affected
→ Linear: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-865/investigate-truncated-postgrest-error-on-brand-detail-page|DEV-865>
_Action: Inspect error serialization in the brand slug route; may be related to DEV-864 (same route)._

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1V|MIT-MAP-1V: ReferenceError: AboutHero is not defined>*
6 events · New · 0 users tracked
→ Linear: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-866/fix-missing-abouthero-import-causing-about-page-crash|DEV-866>
_Action: Add missing import for AboutHero component in the about page file._

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-8|MIT-MAP-8: Error: aborted>* — 25 events · Recurring · 0 users
_HTTP connection aborts from client disconnects (`abortIncoming` handler) — expected server behavior._

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-21|MIT-MAP-21: NS_ERROR_FAILURE>* — 6 events · New · 0 users
_Firefox-specific network error on `/brands/:slug`, no error message — likely downstream of DEV-864._
